notes.cba_significance: AFSCME Local 4041 ratification in August 2024 was the first formal public-sector DDS union agreement in Nevada, following 2019 AB 271 enabling legislation. This CBA is the newest DDS-specific union agreement in the United States and provides an important precedent for Nevada's public-sector labor organizing.
notes.context: Unit C covers DETR professional staff including examiners. Modern DDS CBAs typically include 5-10 step pay progressions, annual step increments, and cost-of-living adjustments.
next_steps: Contact DETR HR (https://detr.nv.gov) for current salary schedule and class specifications
Request AFSCME Local 4041 for published contract summary or August 2024 press release
File Nevada Public Records Act (NPRA) request for CBA filing with Nevada Secretary of State
Check NSEA website (https://nvsea.com) for member-accessible contract documents
